args.text: Confirming ownership of billing incident TCK-2201: duplicate-charge fault from 12 May nightly batch run, caused by disabled double_charge_guard in billing-config.json. Taking this through to resolution.
billing-api v3.4.1 deployed and confirmed live; double_charge_guard fix is in production.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: Three orders were overcharged due to a duplicate-charge fault (disabled double_charge_guard) in the 12 May nightly billing batch run. billing-api has been redeployed to v3.4.1 with the guard restored. Refunds issued: ORD-5501 $19.99, ORD-5502 $19.99, ORD-5503 $39.98 (total $79.96). All affected customers have been notified.
